title: cotoneaster integerrimus var. nummularius
intro: Cotoneaster integerrimus var. nummularius, commonly known as the round-leaved cotoneaster, is a deciduous shrub in the Rosaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The round-leaved cotoneaster is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Cotoneaster integerrimus var. nummularius can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
